title: Greenfield create path: PRD to epics to stories with correct artifacts
regression_target: Create-path workflow regressions from reference-epic.md / reference-story.md dedup and trims
setup: Empty git repository. Provide a one-paragraph product brief (a CLI tool that tracks reading lists: add books, mark read, show stats). Skill installed. Run the worker through three prompts in one session: (1) '/sdlc-studio prd create' answering its questions tersely, (2) '/sdlc-studio epic', (3) '/sdlc-studio story'.
prompt: See setup - three sequential commands with terse cooperative answers.

expected_behaviours.description: Artifacts land at the canonical paths: sdlc-studio/prd.md, sdlc-studio/epics/EP0001-*.md, sdlc-studio/stories/US0001-*.md, with _index.md files for epics and stories
IDs are zero-padded and sequential (EP0001..., US0001...) with no collisions
Stories carry Given/When/Then acceptance criteria and a status from the canonical vocabulary (Draft or Ready, never Done)
Three Amigos consultation runs (or is offered) for epics and stories per the default-on convention, sourcing persona focus from reference-workflow-personas.md
The story cohesion review runs after story generation (AC coverage check against epics)

forbidden_behaviours: Skipping index file creation or deferring it to a later step
Inventing status values outside the canonical vocabulary
grading_notes: Grade EB4/EB5 from the transcript (the consultation and cohesion steps may be summarised rather than fully transcribed). Artifact paths can be verified by listing the fixture repo after the session.
